channel.title: The White Pages on The City
channel.description: Recent content in The White Pages on The City

item.title: Judas Maldito
item.description: The universe’s favorite chew toy. By design.

item.title: Dr. Crispy
item.description:
Regularly seen in the area around the Mission of the Helping Hand, he consistenly claims that at one time he made the best fried chicken when he was a cook in New Orleans.

Those that have known him for years know better. He was once covered in lighter fluid and lit on fire. Regardless, he pays attention to what’s going on and, if he likes you, he’ll share what he sees.

item.title: Antonio Ricci
item.description:
blah blah blah

Storyteller Info

AR’s driving goal is to open a gateway to his masters so that they can dance with him. Judas did some design work.

He managed a small gate in the central park, closed by Judas and John (add link) with the support of the Sept of the Blue Box and The Sanctum of Hidden Scars

Inspiration / Source
  • The Architecture Of Doom This is the 2.0 version, expanded beyond what I’d originally worked with.
  • The Labyrinth at Hawara: What the Scans Found and Why Egypt Won’t Let Anyone Dig

item.title: The Smiling Man
item.description:
An extra insane BSD with a very truncated muzzle and mouth that appears to be smiling. Each tooth is laced with veins of silver.

He hungers and hunts, but has been driven from one of the local packs.

He has an irrational fear of chalked or spray painted human outlines

He lives in the abandoned Shermer High School, one tactic he uses is to put out advertisements for raves and then picks off one or two attendees.
